creator: gb@unistra.fr
text:
Created attachment 218531
Output of portmaster upgrade of pkg

Hello


For a few weeks now, pkg port fails to link in our FreeBSD jails (12.1-RELEASE-p7 amd64). Attached is a log of portmaster's output. The package builds without problem on the host.

make.conf contains

WRKDIRPREFIX=           /var/ports
DISTDIR=                /var/ports/distfiles
PACKAGES=               /var/ports/packages
INDEXDIR=               /var/ports
DEFAULT_VERSIONS+=apache=2.4
DEFAULT_VERSIONS+=perl5=5.32
DEFAULT_VERSIONS+=ssl=openssl

The kernel on the host is an unmodified GENERIC one.
Let me know what else you'd need to help fix the issue.

Regards
Guy
